title: Lullaby Baby Children’s Baby Pram | Kids Toys Pink Baby Pram | Adjustable Canopy and Easy to Fold and Store
features: Baby Stroller: Our Lullaby Baby pram is perfect for a stroll with your little one’s favourite doll. Whether, walking through the park, on an adventure or even just playing around the house. Watch as your little one gets the chance to expand their nurturing and imagination skills throughout this creative play experience.

Pretend Play: Pretend-play is an essential part of early learning and perfect for imagination and creative play and for fostering creativity and developing skills. Role-play allows your child to see things in different perspectives and let them experience a wide range of emotions.

Easy fold and store: Our KandyToys pram is a perfect toy for households with limited space. This stroller is lightweight and folds up to be easily stored in those tricky and restricted spaces at home, on trips to school or when you are out and about!

Product specifications: Our doll stroller fit dolls up to 45cm long, folds away for easy storage also includes an adjustable canopy and smooth rolling wheels for your little one to stroll around with ease!
